basic_details.job_title: IIT Dharwad Nursing Superintendent Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Dharwad (IIT Dharwad) has officially announced the Nursing Superintendent Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published under Advt. No. IITDh/Admin/SR/45/2026-27 at IIT Dharwad Official Website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of not more than 40 years and hold a Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery or B.Sc. (Nursing) with relevant experience can now submit their online applications up to 05 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for the Nursing Superintendent post is not more than 40 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: 3 Year Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery with minimum 60% marks + 06 years' experience OR Four-Year B.Sc. (Nursing) with minimum 60% marks + 03 years' experience. Master's Degree (Nursing) can count towards experience (max 02 years).
qualification.details: Nursing Superintendent: 03 Year Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery with minimum 60% marks Four-Year B.Sc. (Nursing) with minimum 60% marks Experience: 06 years' experience after diploma in a recognized hospital OR 03 years' experience after degree in a registered hospital. For candidates with a full-time Master's Degree (Nursing), the duration of the Master's program shall be counted towards experience (maximum up to 02 years).

salary_details.details: The consolidated salary for the Nursing Superintendent post is Rs. 40,000/- per month.

selection_process: Skill Test/Interview/Any other mode as decided by the Institute (or) Selection Committee
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Dharwad Nursing Superintendent Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Dharwad to complete the application.
